steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The blank occupies the subject position in an independent clause and must refer to cottonseed oil (singular, non-human).

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content: A pronoun must agree with its antecedent in number and person. It is the singular pronoun for this non-human referent. They and those are plural (wrong number), and that is not a personal pronoun. That matches choice D — D is correct.
